item.title: Genpact Banking Analyst Suite
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: For institutions using Genpact's riskCanvas financial crime platform, Banking Analyst Suite will run natively alongside riskCanvas.
updates.after_state: "native integration with riskCanvas financial crime platform"

evidence.source_quote: For institutions using Genpact's riskCanvas® financial crime platform, Banking Analyst Suite will run natively alongside riskCanvas®.

updates.event: Genpact plans to extend Banking Analyst Suite across additional regulated banking workflows, including customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas.
updates.after_state: "planned expansion across customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas"

evidence.source_quote: Genpact plans to extend Banking Analyst Suite across additional regulated banking workflows, including customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas.

facts.statement: For institutions using Genpact's riskCanvas financial crime platform, Banking Analyst Suite will run natively alongside riskCanvas.
facts.value: native integration with riskCanvas financial crime platform

facts.statement: Genpact plans to extend Banking Analyst Suite across additional regulated banking workflows, including customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas.
facts.value: planned expansion across customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas

item.html:
For institutions using Genpact's riskCanvas financial crime platform, Banking Analyst Suite will run natively alongside riskCanvas.

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态："native integration with riskCanvas financial crime platform"

证据：prnewswire.com ↗

Genpact plans to extend Banking Analyst Suite across additional regulated banking workflows, including customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas.

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态："planned expansion across customer due diligence, screening, fraud, customer service, and other risk areas"
